notes: 1RU when shelf-mounted via optional KPU-Shelf (which holds two units in 2RU); chassis height is 3.31" (84mm), which is greater than 1RU (44.45mm) but the unit ships as a desktop/portable device. AJA's own KPU-Shelf accessory mounts two units in 2RU, confirming each is 1RU equivalent. rackUnits set to 1 per reviewer guidance. DB-25 physical connector not present in schema — AES/EBU and analog audio DB-25 TASCAM-pinout ports mapped to aes3 with explanatory notes. 4-pin XLR DC inputs mapped to xlr3 (closest available) with notes. Fiber LC ports require optional SFP modules and occupy the same signal path as the corresponding SDI BNC ports. Second Ref BNC is loop-through. Power: dual redundant 4-pin XLR DC inputs (12–18V DC) plus included AC power adapter (100–240VAC, 50/60Hz) connected via separate IEC/brick — the AC adapter itself is external and connects via the 4-pin XLR.

ports.name: Fiber In 1
ports.note: Optional SFP module; replaces corresponding SDI BNC input when installed

ports.name: AES/EBU Audio
ports.note: 8-channel AES/EBU via DB-25 TASCAM pinout (physical connector is DB-25, not AES3 XLR); carries both input and output on a single connector per AJA spec '1/2x DB-25'

ports.name: Analog Audio In
ports.note: 8-channel balanced analog via DB-25 TASCAM pinout; physical connector is DB-25 — no DB-25 type in schema, aes3 used as closest available; 24-bit A/D

ports.name: Analog Audio Out
ports.note: 8-channel balanced analog via DB-25 TASCAM pinout; physical connector is DB-25; 24-bit D/A

ports.name: Ref In
ports.note: External reference (blackburst/tri-level sync), looping — 2 BNC connectors

ports.name: RS-422
ports.note: DE-9 female; Sony 9-pin machine control protocol

ports.name: DC Power 1
ports.note: 4-pin XLR DC input; 12–18V DC, 5.4A max; dual redundant with DC Power 2

ports.name: DC Power 2
ports.note: 4-pin XLR DC input; second redundant DC input; 12–18V DC
